metadata.description: Curated skills for Claude Code: deep research, code simplification, and dev-loop cycles.

plugins.name: deep-research
plugins.description: Multi-source research engine with tiered model pinning (sonnet/haiku agents for research, parent model for synthesis), deep-fetch, content refinement, and flexible output: terminal, file, or skillwiki vault integration. Now spawnable as a subagent (model: sonnet) via deep-research:deep-research.

plugins.name: simplify
plugins.description: Code review with reuse, quality, and efficiency passes

plugins.name: dev-loop
plugins.description: Generic single-pass PRD + skillwiki dev cycle engine. v1.15.0: pluggable multi-backend code review — CODE_REVIEW_BACKENDS at REFRESH; REVIEW step spawns simplify-worker + optional codex-review-worker in parallel; per-intensity opt-in via setup interview Section M. v1.14.0: auto-compact firing probe via isCompactSummary:true in session jsonl; AUDIT surfaces CC built-in Auto-Memory. v1.13.0: removed /compact + /clear (harness-driven). v1.12.0: dep-drift detector. MERGE CI gate uses ci-health-worker. Execution subagents hard-wired to sonnet. /setup-dev-loop scaffolds 13 config sections (A-M). Pluggable knowledge backends, drift guard, project-agnostic.

plugins.name: hermes-cli
plugins.description: Hermes Agent CLI commands reference — full terminal command surface for hermes-agent by NousResearch

plugins.name: playwright-cli
plugins.description: Browser automation via playwright-cli with browser-worker agent (model: sonnet) for mechanical Chrome lifecycle and interaction tasks — fork of microsoft/playwright-cli with attach+headed defaults and project config overrides

plugins.name: host-backup-restore
plugins.description: Host-level backup and restore with profile system (presets + custom YAML profiles), model-aware agents (sonnet worker), post-discovery research, and skillwiki infrastructure capture. Supports Caddy domains, databases, systemd services, Hermes snapshots, and restore target pre-inspection.
